title: Weak authentication allowed imposter to hijack customer’s cell phone account
summary: The complainant learned that an imposter had contacted his cell phone service provider and used social engineering techniques to gain access to his cell phone account. During the call, the imposter obtained information from the customer service representative about the account, including billing and call-history information, and successfu...
